note: Merge commit fa14d02 marked L-8 verified. Linux SettingsDialog no longer exposes the unsupported AI tab, settings.ai bindings, provider/model/endpoint/API-key controls, or QML-only AI default seeding. Linux bridge still preserves AI settings in the JSON blob for cross-frontend compatibility, but the Linux UI no longer presents fake controls without backing invokables. Full Linux crate validation remains blocked on this host by the existing Qt/cxx-qt qyieldcpu.h issue.
